title: 2026 Game Writing SIG Donations
pageTexts:
Write Club 2026

            GDC - San Francisco
         Tuesday, March 10 2026

Who We Are

The World's First Professional Organization for Game Writers

Founded in 2002, the IGDA Game Writing SIG has served as both a         Our Legacy
welcoming community for game writers and an advocacy
organization promoting the art and craft of game writing.                First white paper standardizing

We include anyone who writes, edits, facilitates, or designs narrative  game writing roles
for games, regardless of title.
                                                                         Foundational text books used
Our Mission
                                                                        worldwide
 Build a worldwide community of game writers
 Promote the art and craft of narrative in games                         Write Club now in its THIRD
 Educate the industry about narrative
 Work towards better narrative in games                                 decade

                                                                         Countless careers launched

                                                                        through our community

A SIG Revived

September 2025: The Constitutional Convention

After years of limited activity outside GDC, the SIG's  Convention Delegates  2026 Committee
founding members and legacy leadership convened to
chart a new course with renewed purpose, establishing    Wendy Despain         Justin Bortnick
a new committe with an updated constitution.
                                                        Cofounder, Chair      Chair, IRL Events
What We Reinforced
                                                         Richard Dansky        Jon Myers
 New constitution ratifying online open governance
 Volunteer-driven committee structure                   Cofounder             Secretary, Tech Officer
 Monthly public meetings with published minutes
 Transparent decision-making in sociocratic consent      Jon Myers             Chride Lassheikki

 Our New Site: https://www.game-writing.com             Convention Secretary  Online Events

                                                         Chris Keeling         Andrea Saravia-Perez
                                                         Matt Forbeck
                                                         Toiya Finley         Resources
                                                         Tobias Heussner
                                                         Justin Bortnick       Sam Webb

                                                                              Moderation

                                                                               Tobias Heussner

                                                                              Mentorship

2025 Momentum: Arcjam

A 72-Hour Narrative Game Jam in Partnership With Arcweave

By the Numbers

350+ professional game writers registered

123  games submitted in 72 hours

8    industry judges

200+ pieces of personalized feedback       READ ALL ABOUT IT ON
                                             OUR UPDATED SITE
1,383 community ratings on itch.io                (click here)

The jam proved our community is hungry for opportunities ­ and that we can deliver

Our Community

A Global Network of Game Writing Professionals

2,100+          4,000+          3,500+          1,100+

Discord Server  Facebook Group  LinkedIn Group      Email List

Plus a rapidly growing presence on LinkedIn, Bluesky, and Twitter/X for direct engagement.

  Who We Reach

    Narrative designers and game writers at all career levels AAA, indie, mobile, and emerging platform creators
    Industry professionals seeking community and resources Students and educators in game narrative

Write Club @ GDC

The Signature Event for Game Writers

The Format                                                      2026 Emcee

 Game writers compete with on-the-spot written responses to           C.J. Kershner

prompts delivered by an emcee. It's chaotic, hilarious, and    WGA/BAFTA-nominated writer
                                                              Head of Polyhedron Productions
uniquely us.
   For over two decades, Write Club has been the must-attend       Longtime Write Club host
gathering for game writers at GDC and other conferences.

What to Expect

 Write Club competition (~1 hour)
 Award announcements and sponsor recognition
 Networking with 120 top game writing professionals
 An unforgettable evening in the heart of GDC week

Write Club isn't just an event. It's where collaborations begin and the community comes together

The Venue

Johnny Foley's Irish House ­ The Cellar

                                                   Where?                 When?

                                                   243 O'Farrel Street    Tuesday, March 10
                                                   3 blocks from Moscone  7:30 pm - 11:00 pm
                                                   Prime GDC real estate

"The Most Authentic Irish Pub on the West Coast"   The space

                    James Joyce Society of Dublin   Private cellar venue (the entire floor)
                                                    Capacity: ~120 guests
                                                    Separate street entrance
                                                    Private bar, stage with microphone
                                                    Intimate atmosphere, classic pub character
                                                    Perfect for Write Club

This is our most prestigious venue yet ­ an upgrade from years past, exclusively ours.

Individual Giving

          Alumni and Member Giving

                                      "Pay it Forward"

           Your Contribution Supports

        Digital Infrastructure: We lost our original site. Never again. We need to maintain our site and resources.
        Future Jams & Events: We're establishing regular opportunities for writers to create, connect, and grow.
        Write Club Online: We plan to bring our signature event to a global audience year round.
        Steam Game Jam Anthology: We plan to publish top jam games on Steam to give writers portfolio credit.
        Historical Preservation: We intend to collect and document the history of the SIG and game writing.

           Recognition

        Name listed on website donor page with Emeritus status recognized (if appropriate)
        Names displayed on donor poster at venue during the Write Club event
        Mention in a group thank you email and a recognition announcement on Discord

The Game Writing SIG has shaped careers for two decades. With this revival, let's make it two more!

Let's Make Write Club 2026 Unforgettable

To Contribute

 Contact us directly or visit our donors page to contribute!

Questions?

 info@game-writing.com
 (857) 363-0727 (Jon)

 The IGDA Game Writing SIG is partnered with the International Game Developers Association,
 a 501(c)(6) professional organization
